summary: Duplicate of the ISS-1033 and ISS-1034 resolution proposals written by a prior analyst run at 2026-04-15T08:13:50Z. Both issues are addressed by EXP-166 (ready-for-integration). The prior analyst run also wrote proposal-ISS-1033-resolution.json and proposal-ISS-1034-resolution.json which point to EXP-166. Decider should process those and ignore this file. Exists only because the FUSE workspace cannot unlink it after it was created in error.
